name: Synchrony Financial Depositary Shares each Representing a 1/40th Interest in a Share of 5.625% Fixed Rate Non-Cumulative Perpetual Preferred Stock Series A
summary: Synchrony Financial Depositary Shares each Representing a 1/40th Interest in a Share of 5.625% Fixed Rate Non-Cumulative Perpetual Preferred Stock Series A represents a fractional ownership in preferred stock issued by Synchrony Financial. Synchrony Financial is a consumer financial services company offering a range of credit products through various channels. The preferred stock offers a fixed dividend rate and has specific rights and preferences as defined in the stock's terms.
